title: Northleaf invests in CCM Hockey alongside Altor Equity Partners
content:
## Northleaf invests in CCM Hockey alongside Altor Equity Partners
On December 31, 2024, Northleaf Capital Partners ("Northleaf"), through funds under its management, completed an investment in CCM Hockey. Northleaf partnered with Altor Equity Partners to acquire the business.
Northleaf is a global private markets investment firm focused on mid-market companies and assets headquartered in Toronto, Ontario.
Altor Equity Partners, based in Stockholm, Sweden, is a private equity firm focused on leveraged buyout and growth capital investments in Sweden, Denmark, Finland, and Norway.
CCM Hockey, headquartered in Montreal, Quebec, is a leading brand of ice hockey equipment and apparel.
McCarthy Tétrault advised Northleaf with a team led by Jamie Becker and Gianluca Mazzanti (Business) that included Stephanie Dewey (Tax).
